signals.opportunity_title: Long-Term Agreement for Supply and Delivery of Hygiene Supplies
signals.notes: Evidence-backed UNDP public procurement notice. Reference UNDP-PHL-00900-3; RFQ; published 30-Jun-2026; deadline 21-Jul-2026 06:00 New York time; contact procurement.ph@undp.org. Notice says tender is managed via UNDP Quantum supplier portal and requires supplier registration/subscription before bidding. Category fit should be checked by Fast Kill because hygiene supplies are not one of the highest-priority export categories. No registration, bid, or external contact performed. Sources used: outputs/source_scans/export_scan_probe_20260630_130537.json, outputs/source_scans/export_candidate_details_20260630_130726.json.

Sources used: outputs/source_scans/export_scan_probe_20260630_130537.json, outputs/source_scans/export_candidate_details_20260630_130726.json.

signals.buyer_name: TradeKey buyer — contact hidden pending sign-in
signals.notes: Evidence-backed public TradeKey RFQ. Page states: posted 29-Jun-2026, time left 28D 16H at scan, South Africa market, food-grade rice, clean packing, recent production date, acceptable shelf life, MOQ/grades/packing/capacity/quote validity requested. Buyer contact is hidden behind TradeKey sign-in; duplicate-looking listing also observed at https://importer.tradekey.com/buyoffer/Supply-Inquiry-For-Rice-3849375.html. Sources used: outputs/source_scans/export_scan_probe_20260630_130537.json, outputs/source_scans/export_candidate_details_20260630_130726.json.

Evidence-backed public TradeKey RFQ. Page states: posted 29-Jun-2026, time left 28D 16H at scan, Turkey shipment, export orders sought, packing in drums/bags/IBCs may be considered, trial order possible before repeat orders; port/loading/compliance details requested. Buyer contact is partially masked and should be verified before any external action. Sources used: outputs/source_scans/export_scan_probe_20260630_130537.json, outputs/source_scans/export_candidate_details_20260630_130726.json.

5-3-2 supplier proof reconciled 2026-06-30: 6 candidates across internal/APEDA, direct exporter site, TradeIndia, and ExportersIndia sources. Quote proofs now Q-002 plus Q-005; Q-005 is a public listed Amar Foodz price proof, not a supplier-requested quote. No supplier RFQ/contact sent; APR-003 remains required for formal quote/COA/spec clarification. Do not finalize pricing/classification/origin claims until turmeric powder vs curcumin ambiguity is resolved.
